top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Markets score big as Iran war nears final whistle and SpaceX takes the field
top_signals.summary: Investors cannot take their eyes off another story playing out: the possibility that the Iran war might finally come to an end.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Knicks Spark Euphoria From Bronx to Brooklyn
top_signals.summary:
Bloomberg's Vanessa Perdomo-Maglione and Randall Williams talk about the kick off to the World Cup and Wednesday night's Knicks comeback. 
The New York Knicks pulled off a record comeback at Game 4 of the NBA Finals, erasing a 29-point deficit Wednesday night to beat the San Antonio Spurs, 107-106, and take a 3-1 lead in the series. OG Anunoby delivered the decisive play, tipping in Jalen Brunson’s missed three-pointer with 1.2 seconds remaining to cap the largest comeback in NBA Finals history. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Three signs that XRP price risks falling below $1 in June
top_signals.summary: XRP is forming head-and-shoulders and bear flag setups on its shorter-timeframe chart, both indicating a dip below $1 in the coming days.
